ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* Use case ID for the configuration */,
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Direction ID for the configuration */,
  "ip_dns" TEXT /* IP address or DNS name associated with the configuration */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Port ID associated with the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is required or optional */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Device ID associated with the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_use_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("use_case_id") REFERENCES use_cases ("use_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("direction_id") REFERENCES directions ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "use_cases" (
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use case */,
  "use_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the use case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the use case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the use case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the use case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the use case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the use case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the direction (inbound or outbound) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the direction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the direction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the direction was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the direction */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the direction was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "subnet_mask" TEXT /* Subnet mask associated with the IP address */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IP address */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the IP address */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the IP address */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Port number */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol associated with the port (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the port */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the port was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the port */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the port was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network administrator, security analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is enabled or disabled */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the update */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the update */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_ip_addresses" (
  "config_ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each config-IP address mapping */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the mapping */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_ip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_ip_addresses_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_ip_addresses_ip_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_ports" (
  "config_port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each config-port mapping */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the mapping */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_ports_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_ports_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, switch, firewall) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the device entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the device entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the device entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the device entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-permission mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the mapping */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_devices" (
  "config_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each config-device mapping */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the mapping */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_devices_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_devices_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, configuration change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
